name: sed
description: Stream editor for filtering and transforming text

name: -e
--expression
options.description: Add a script to the commands to be run

name: -f
--file
options.description: Read the script from a file

name: -n
--quiet
--silent
options.description: Suppress automatic printing of the pattern space

name: -s
--separate
options.description: Treat files as separate rather than one stream
